identity.fantasy: Leap through a living jungle canopy beside a cheerful monkey and harvest five golden banana bunches into a woven basket.
identity.playerVerb: Make comfortable jumps to pick each glowing banana bunch.
identity.targetMetaphor: Five visible banana bunches that glow, pop free, arc into the basket, and remain visibly collected.

beats.purpose: Learn two forgiving low-canopy jumps and see the first bananas fly into the basket.
Climb into the middle canopy for two slightly higher, quicker harvest jumps.
Reach one final golden banana and trigger the monkey's full basket celebration.

reactiveStates: collected banana with check mark and monkey reaction
presenter.continuousFeedback: A room-readable jump cue, current banana tally, active-bunch pulse, harvest arc, reaction callout, and basket fill respond through every jump.
presenter.scoreAndResolution: A persistent five-banana mission tally survives all three authored rounds and resolves with a localized full-basket panel, monkey dance, and jungle confetti.
